workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Give me the manager view on this Pacific Northwest Outfitters meeting transcript. The customer escalated this morning.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-01 17:18 EST
Subject: whitespace analysis - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with whitespace analysis. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 13:55 EST
Subject: URGENT: whitespace analysis Issue at Pacific Northwest Outfitters

Our team encountered some challenges with whitespace analysis. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Andrew Taylor <andrew.taylor@pacificnorth.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 09:56 EST
Subject: Re: Re: whitespace analysis Timeline

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Pacific Northwest Outfitters: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF33-I trap (Misattributes a statement to wrong thread participant); produces complete Thread analysis, draft response, waiting-on-whom assessment, MSX pipeline note proposal (if warrante
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF33-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF33-I failure mode (Misattributes a statement to wrong thread participant)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF33-I -- Misattributes a statement to wrong thread participant
